deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. 4 bed / 3 bath. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, profit $42-62K. Not our listing. CMA pulled, 31 comps, avg $207K.
deals.next: Feed data to Sirhc for branded analysis sheet. Lock template.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land/acreage development. Listing canceled. Chris walking away. Signs picked up last week. Isaac Linares showed development interest (~$150K for mobile home project) but no path forward.

logs.m: Listing terminated. Signs picked up. Walking away from deal.
Isaac development discussion. Sisters interested but no formal offer.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: 3 bed / 2 full / 2 half, 2,972 sqft. VA loan $489.5K payoff. Underwater $93-143K. Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Sellers moving back in to make updates.
deals.next: Relationship intact. Plan relist after updates.

logs.m: Listing terminated. Matt and Chandler moving back in. Plan to relist after repairs.
Honest conversation. Chandler laid off. Leaning toward short sale. Still confident in Chris.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3 bed / 2.5 bath, 1,886 sqft, 2011 build, Laura Heights PUD. Listed $259,900. June deadline. Second-look buyers are hottest lead. Pre-inspection report offered.
deals.next: Confirm May 30 showing time. Follow up with second-look buyers. Monitor for backup offer.

logs.m: Second-look buyers came back. Home is their favorite. Pre-inspection offered.
Investor cash offer $176,300. Texted sellers, keeping conversation open.
MLS live. First showing 9:15am. Neighborhood canvassed. Sign and lockbox dropped.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 3 bed / 2 bath, 1,809 sqft, 4.05 acres. Payoff $257K. Divorce situation. CMA pulled $295K recommended. Net sheet built.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender. Get listing agreement signed. Schedule professional photos.

logs.m: Met at property. CMA pulled. Payoff confirmed. Listing presentation built.
Prior clients. Going through divorce. Colton looking for contractor work.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Cash sale, $152,000. Lien holder resolved Apr 21. Cleared and funded Apr 26. Officially closed Apr 27.
deals.next: Confirm commission. Deliver gift basket. Thank Chelsey and Sam VanDenheuvel.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Lien issue resolved. Transaction complete.
Fernando Castillo signed lien release at mobile notary. Delivered to Chicago Title same day.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property. Under contract with Espinoza buyers at $113K. Waiting on EMD and signed TXR 1903 amendment from buyer's agent Javier.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received. Confirm signed amendment back from Javier. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email.

logs.m: Espinoza buyers under contract at $113K. TXR 1903 amendment sent to Javier. EMD pending.
Clearing complete. Steve sent photos. First offer dead (Michael Rodriguez / RBFCU).

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Priority Bank REO. Cleanup in progress (HouzzPro / Matt Toney). Drywall crew patching remaining holes. Utilities pending. Police reports stalled. Listing agreement not yet submitted to bank.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric and EMCSUD. Submit listing agreement to Jerry and Ray. Replace camera batteries.

logs.m: Drywall crew patching. Sent photos to Kelly. Need to email Kelly, Jerry, Ray with progress.
Cleanup active. Floor demo complete. Drywall cut. Utilities confirmed. Listing paperwork needed.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental being sold. Looking at new construction, no HOA. Evaluated 301 W Saxet Corpus wholesale deal ($85K) with FHA 203(k). Out of that deal as of June 1. Still actively searching. Zach Schaphorst approved ~$122K.
leads.next: Confirm pre-approval status with Zach. Revisit new construction search options.

leads.title: Bryce (Dumpster Contractor)
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. Wife is active military, VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting. Looking to buy in San Antonio area.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info when next on-site. Qualify wife VA eligibility. Send VA Buyers Guide.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent, Schertz/Cibolo area. Has buyer interested in property needing work. Unique situation pending details.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome for full buyer and property details.

leads.title: Christina Shine
leads.detail: Met at garden event May 9. Has property 13810 Tangle Tree St, ~90% complete, plans to sell soon. Currently working with another realtor. Open to selling as-is.
leads.next: Follow up on finishing progress. Offer to promote listing to network. Stay connected through garden community.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor (Son)
leads.detail: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor behind her may have passed away. Son now owns house. Avid gardener with plants on fence. Son has not been contacted yet.
leads.next: Get son info from Miss Pat. Reach out with neighborhood/garden angle. Assess if selling, renting, or keeping.

leads.title: Kurt (Neighbor)
leads.detail: Neighbor around 9815 Conbes. Interested in nearby listing under contract at $275K. Wants intel on offers. Possible seller or buyer lead.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurt area. Get listing details on 9815 Conbes. Report back to Kurt.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through garden share group. Grief to healing to plants story. Potential content collaboration. Trust-based, long-term real estate potential.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share story for content. Keep nurturing relationship.

leads.title: Isaac (Investor Lead)
leads.detail: Met in person. Buy box unknown. Area of interest likely Schertz based on context. Full intake still needed.
leads.next: Full Sage intake call. Understand buy box, budget, timeline, strategy.

priorities.title: 181 CR 7751 Listing Agreement
priorities.notes: Listing agreement for 181 CR 7751 must go to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham (ray.stidham@prioritybank.com). Cleanup in progress, utilities pending. This unlocks listing timeline.

priorities.title: 10023 Mill Path - Second Look Buyers
priorities.notes: Second-look buyers are most interested. They love floorplan and condition. Pre-inspection report offered. Confirm May 30 showing time and follow up after showing.

followUps.text: Follow up with buyers agent after showing

priorities.title: Medina Electric & EMCSUD Calls
priorities.notes: Call Medina Electric (866-632-3532) for new meter status. Call EMCSUD (830-709-3879) for water service confirmation. Get transformer # on next site visit.

priorities.title: Brandon Moran & Milagros Builder Visit
priorities.sub: Register as buyer agent for new construction
priorities.notes: Schedule visit with Brandon and his mom Milagros to Grace Gardens. Call Carlos McLean (210-605-0241) first. Register as buyer agent on first builder visit (critical). Budget ~$50K down, target ~$1K/month P&I.

followUps.text: Text Brandon to confirm visit date
Register as buyer agent at builder

priorities.title: Tilden 20ac - EMD & Amendment
priorities.notes: Waiting on earnest money deposit from Espinoza buyers and signed TXR 1903 amendment from buyer agent Javier. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email (tmail.com may be typo).
